title: verbascum rotundifolium subsp. rotundifolium
intro: Verbascum rotundifolium subsp. rotundifolium, also known as the Round-leaved Mullein, is a biennial plant belonging to the Scrophulariaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions such as bronchitis, coughs, and skin irritations. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to provide relief from respiratory issues and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Verbascum rotundifolium subsp. rotundifolium is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and offer additional health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving sleep quality.
